bank.title: Daily Bank
bank.description: A bank of regular, repeatable tasks you can pull into sections. Each bank task has steps — complete steps for partial XP, finish all steps to complete the task.

items.title: Morning Routine
items.notes: A short set of rituals to start the day.

items.title: Evening Reflection
items.notes: Close the day with a short reflection.

phd.title: PhD Journey
phd.description: Long-term research goals, writing, coursework and skill building.

items.title: Topic Exploration Session
items.notes: Read 2 papers or map a new idea.

items.title: Research Skill-Building Block
items.notes: Practice a method or tool for 45–60 minutes.

items.title: Academic Writing Session
items.notes: Draft 300–800 words or revise a section.

skool.title: Skool Community
skool.description: Course creation, community engagement, and content production.

items.title: Community Engagement (Reply + Post)
items.notes: Post or meaningfully reply to community threads.

items.title: Lesson Recording Prep
items.notes: Outline or rehearse a lesson segment.

doc.title: Documentary Tracking
doc.description: Daily logs, milestones, and documentary-style reflections.

items.title: Daily Log Entry
items.notes: Write a short log of progress and obstacles.

items.title: Milestone Capture
items.notes: Record a milestone (chapter draft, submission, presentation).

daily.title: Daily Systems
daily.description: Rituals and focused daily work blocks.

items.title: Weekly Review
items.notes: Review last week and plan next week.

items.title: Monthly Ecosystem Review
items.notes: High-level review of goals and systems.

shop.name: Akatsuki Cloak
shop.description: Cosmetic cloak. Equipping shows a cloak on your avatar and grants a small prestige badge.

shop.name: Akatsuki Ring
shop.description: A ring that appears on your avatar and grants a small streak bonus (visual only).

shop.name: Anbu Mask
shop.description: A mysterious mask for your avatar; cosmetic and toggles a mask overlay.

shop.name: Summon Raven Companion
shop.description: A raven companion that appears beside your avatar and triggers a small XP sparkle on task completion.

shop.name: Leather Notebook
shop.description: Cosmetic notebook; unlocks a 'quick note' UI in future updates.

shop.name: Research Dagger
shop.description: Cosmetic blade; used in avatar portraits and achievement banners.

metaNotes.persistence: Client-side localStorage is authoritative. game-data.json seeds the first run only; saved sections (ak_sections) will not be overwritten.
metaNotes.bankGuideline: Bank tasks are templates. Use the UI to add a bank task into any section as a full task (with steps preserved).
metaNotes.shopEffects: Shop items include 'effect' objects that the client applies to avatar.appearance and small gameplay bonuses.
